item.title: This is why the government wants facial recognition cameras on every corner, so people like this can't fight bad government long enough to create positive change.
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/jackfergjack Hey can we talk about the Declaration of Independence for a second? Did you know in it they list why King George had gone too far and why they had to abolish the corrupt government and build a new one? Take a look at the list, see if anything looks familiar. Here's the things King George did: "He has refused his Assent to Laws, the most wholesome and necessary for the public good. He has forbidden his Governors to pass Laws of immediate and pressing importance, unless suspended in their operation till his Assent should be obtained; and when so suspended, he has utterly neglected to attend to them. He has refused to pass other Laws for the accommodation of large districts of people, unless those people would relinquish the right of Representation in the Legislature, a right inestimable to them and formidable to tyrants only. He has called together legislative bodies at places unusual, uncomfortable, and distant from the depository of their public Records, for the sole purpose of fatiguing them into compliance with his measures. He has dissolved Representative Houses repeatedly, for opposing with manly firmness his invasions on the rights of the people. He has refused for a long time, after such dissolutions, to cause others to be elected; whereby the Legislative powers, incapable of Annihilation, have returned to the People at large for their exercise; the State remaining in the mean time exposed to all the dangers of invasion from without, and convulsions within. He has endeavoured to prevent the population of these States; for that purpose obstructing the Laws for Naturalization of Foreigners; refusing to pass others to encourage their migrations hither, and raising the conditions of new Appropriations of Lands. He has obstructed the Administration of Justice, by refusing his Assent to Laws for establishing Judiciary powers. He has made Judges dependent on his Will alone, for the tenure of their offices, and the amount and payment of their salaries. He has erected a multitude of New Offices, and sent hither swarms of Officers to harrass our people, and eat out their substance. (ICE?) He has kept among us, in times of peace, Standing Armies without the Consent of our legislatures. (ICE and national guard sent to cities to wonder around) He has affected to render the Military independent of and superior to the Civil power. He has combined with others to subject us to a jurisdiction foreign to our constitution, and unacknowledged by our laws; giving his Assent to their Acts of pretended Legislation: For Quartering large bodies of armed troops among us: For protecting them, by a mock Trial, from punishment for any Murders which they should commit on the Inhabitants of these States: (ICE!!) For cutting off our Trade with all parts of the world: (tariffs and such) For imposing Taxes on us without our Consent: (tariffs and such) For depriving us in many cases, of the benefits of Trial by Jury: (ICE taking people who are legally her or who are citizens and holding them without trial) For transporting us beyond Seas to be tried for pretended offences: (ICE and sending people off to prison work camps in other countries) For abolishing the free System of English Laws in a neighbouring Province, establishing therein an Arbitrary government, and enlarging its Boundaries so as to render it at once an example and fit instrument for introducing the same absolute rule into these Colonies: For taking away our Charters, abolishing our most valuable Laws, and altering fundamentally the Forms of our Governments: For suspending our own Legislatures, and declaring themselves invested with power to legislate for us in all cases whatsoever. He has abdicated Government here, by declaring us out of his Protection and waging War against us. He has plundered our seas, ravaged our Coasts, burnt our towns, and destroyed the lives of our people. He is at this time transporting large Armies of foreign Mercenaries to compleat the works of death, desolation and tyranny, already begun with circumstances of Cruelty & perfidy scarcely paralleled in the most barbarous ages, and totally unworthy the Head of a civilized nation. He has constrained our fellow Citizens taken Captive on the high Seas to bear Arms against their Country, to become the executioners of their friends and Brethren, or to fall themselves by their Hands. He has excited domestic insurrections amongst us, and has endeavoured to bring on the inhabitants of our frontiers, the merciless Indian Savages, whose known rule of warfare, is an undistinguished destruction of all ages, sexes and conditions."
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

rainbowcrab95772

item.title: A comedy of incompetence
item.description:
Not too much to add from social sciences to this one. People with disabilities face a lot of additional social, ethical, financial costs in a day that most of us don't. It can be called a disability tax.
Many people, adults with 9-5s, officers representing the law, still operate under a presumption that what we do is not visible, recorded, and shareable on video.
Beat the case single handedly. If we know what CBS affiliate she is popping in on, drop in the comments!
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Well .. shit happens.
item.description: Furious farmer sprays dozens of luxury cars with thick cow slurry after drivers ignored signs and illegally parked in his field during the scorching Bank Holiday heatwave. The chaos unfolded near Rydal Water in the Lake District, Cumbria, where at least 20 vehicles, including Mercedes, Jaguars and BMWs, were left covered in manure. Clear signs reading “Polite Notice, DO NOT PARK IN THE FIELD” and “SHEEP IN FIELD” were completely ignored, with drivers even moving rocks that had been placed to block access. The farmer drove his slurry tanker up and down the field, calmly hosing down every car in the baking heat. Cumbria Police have confirmed they were called and are investigating, but many locals are saying the drivers got exactly what they deserved. Classic case of “park like an idiot, pay the price.” or shorter "FAFO".
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Doctor Daddy etc
item.description: Fun fact: the time it takes us to create one comic is roughly the same as a transatlantic flight. Except there are no free drinks, no movies and the turbulence is emotional. If you've ever wished you could buy us that airplane tomato juice: Patreon is basically that, but better. You'll get exclusive comics, behind-the-scenes content, and the warm feeling of keeping two sleep-deprived artists alive! https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: kyiv residential building reconstruction 2022 to 2023.
item.description: comparison photo of the residential high rise building in kyiv that got hit by a missile in february 2022. they used temporary shoring and managed to completely rebuild the destroyed section in just one year by february 2023 instead of tearing down the whole block. #kyiv #construction #reconstruction #engineering #beforeandafter
item.dc:creator: SmartConstructionIndia

item.title: GovBrief Today #482
item.description: Donald Trump's Justice Department is criminally investigating the 82-year-old woman who won a sexual abuse case against him. They claim E. Jean Carroll lied in a deposition about who paid her legal bills. An appeals court called that a nonissue. Hers was a civil case, and now they want her charged with a crime. Donald Trump remains the only president impeached twice, even though he escaped consequences both times. He may escape Carroll the same way, and talk the Supreme Court into erasing the $88 million he owes her. But a jury found him liable for sexually abusing her and for defaming her when he denied it, and the courts upheld every word. Everything else is just him trying to weasel out of the consequences again. I've emailed 7,581 stories over 482 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260527-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may27 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-rio-grande [3] https://go.govbrief.today/dei-report [4] https://go.govbrief.today/worship-buffer [5] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-196 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/rodriguez-prosecution [7] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-doj [8] https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-tariffs [9] https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-dulles [10] https://go.govbrief.today/nps-fees [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-100-tax [12] https://go.govbrief.today/pool-profit [13] https://go.govbrief.today/beyer-arch [14] https://go.govbrief.today/retired-judges Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Today France made History
item.description: On May 28, 2026, the French National Assembly unanimously voted to repeal the remaining legal traces of the “Code Noir” (“Black Code”), the infamous slavery code established under King Louis XIV in 1685. The vote result was striking: 254 members voted, the required majority was 128, 254 voted in favor, 0 voted against. The “Code Noir” (“Black Code”) had regulated slavery in the French colonies. It defined enslaved Africans as property, imposed Catholicism upon them, and authorized severe punishments. Although slavery itself had long been abolished, the text had never been formally removed from French law. France first abolished slavery during the French Revolution in 1794. However, Napoleon Bonaparte restored it in 1802 in several French colonies. Slavery was then definitively abolished in 1848 under the Second Republic, notably through the action of abolitionist Victor SCHŒLCHER. The 2026 repeal is therefore mostly symbolic, but many French lawmakers described it as an important act of historical recognition, memory, and justice. I didn't find it translated but the emotion of parliament member Steevy Gustave speak to the heart of every human : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tHN2shM_LPw
item.dc:creator: torp

item.title: Bestie says goodbye to her namesake Jaime
item.description: Bestie came over tonight because she really needed kitten therapy. She got a call today that her dad has been hospitalized. His liver cancer has spread to his lymph nodes and brain, and he doesn’t have much time left. He’s in Florida, so bestie is making plans to fly there this weekend. She said goodbye to her namesake Jaime tonight, since he and brother Ever are going to their forever home in CA this weekend. Please send good thoughts to bestie as she navigates this terrible situation.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
